market: Market volatility surged due to geopolitical tensions following Trump's warning to Iran; sell-side sidecar triggered.
Index hit a daily low of 5,176.56 after a volatile session.
art: BAMA 2026 (Busan International Gallery Art Fair) opened today at BEXCO.
Theme: 'NODE: A Knot of Connection and Expansion' featuring 136 galleries and ~4,000 works.
Event continues through April 5; focuses on emerging artists and experimental media/sculpture.
